user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Grab a quick hotel breakfast — coffee, pastries, fruit, and light hot options — ideal for fueling up before the morning meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: Insert at position 0 so breakfast occurs before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting; 8:00-8:30 AM allows time to eat and walk to the meeting.
